captions.01.jpeg: At this Balcones Neighborhood homeI replaced the rotted Ipe wood on this gate and finished it with Penofin.
captions.02.jpeg: Ipe canbe difficult to work with and requires predrilling and special screws but it is very durable and looks great when finished.
captions.03.jpeg: This East Austin homeowner wanted some steps so her family guests could access the back yard more easily.
captions.04.jpeg: I designed and build these wide steps with a low rise and a wide tread to elegantly unite the levels.
